images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol/influencer‑style model with flawless yet realistic skin, visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, and straight black silky hair—her fit, curvy figure emphasized by a sleek, form‑fitting ivory silk slip dress that features delicate lace panels at the neckline and a subtle sheer midriff, the fabric catching light like liquid satin. She stands under a cascade of vibrant neon signage (hot pink, electric blue, neon green) that floods the scene with bright, even, colorful gel lighting, eliminating heavy shadows and preserving a crisp, clean vibe. The background— a modern Tokyo alley with sleek graffiti‑covered walls and distant streetlamps—blurs into a creamy bokeh, keeping all focus on her at eye‑level. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, realistic ray tracing, global illumination, and subtle desaturated muted color grading for an edge‑of‑danger aesthetic, she offers a playful wink and a confident, teasing smile, as if sharing a secret with the camera and her fans.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol/influencer, flawless yet natural skin with soft visible pores, large expressive eyes, and a confident smirk. She wears a deep emerald silk slip dress that clings to her curvy silhouette, its delicate spaghetti straps exposing smooth collarbones and shoulders; the sheen of the fabric catches the refrigerator‑door light flooding the rooftop parking lot. She holds a translucent umbrella, raindrops glittering on the dark asphalt, while the city skyline blurs into luminous bokeh behind her. Her straight black hair is slightly damp, strands clinging to her neck, framing an elegant, sophisticated expression. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, ray‑traced lighting, capturing crisp textures and a moody green color grade that feels intimate yet poised—an haute‑couture editorial captured in the rain‑kissed night of Tokyo.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese idol/influencer model with flawless yet realistic skin, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, a fit curvy figure, and straight black silky hair, posed in a bright cyberpunk‑lit art gallery before a contemporary canvas. She wears a form‑fitting, backless evening gown of sheer silk that hugs her slim waist and ample chest, the black fabric catching the dual‑tone neon purple and blue glow from softly diffused LED strips, while the background is rendered in shallow depth of field bokeh with distant neon signage and glass artworks. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, the image features global illumination and ray‑traced lighting for lifelike highlights, an eye‑level perspective, and a subtle seductive smile that hints at awareness of the viewer, conveying a zen‑peaceful mood amidst futuristic urban elegance.8k photo, Large breasts
